purpose_context: Spec Kitty maintainers need template resolution to follow the same doctrine-to-charter-to-core authority chain as other mission-type configuration. This mission fills the reserved template-set contract for issue 2658 while preserving current software-dev behavior and excluding the epic's later enumeration and tree-retirement slices.
purpose_tldr: Make each activated mission type own its template selection without software-dev defaults.
source_description: Priivacy-ai/spec-kitty issue 2658: specify_cli/missions retirement — Templates-as-config: fill the template_set slot (#2652-T)
